ops.text: Harden CommandProcessor for exhaustive status and raw error reporting
[Auto-Fix] Add workflow permissions to allow gh dispatch

data.trigger: Trigger failed: GitHub API Error 422 on https://api.github.com/repos/GetyeTek/IDE/actions/workflows/244999146/dispatches: {"message":"Workflow does not have 'workflow_dispatch' trigger","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"422"}

ops.text: Add Firebase Test Lab job targeting Samsung A-series and S-series devices

ops.find_block:
- name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk
ops.replace_with:
- name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk

  test:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: .

      - id: 'auth'
        uses: 'google-github-actions/auth@v2'
        with:
          credentials_json: '${{ secrets.GCP_SA_KEY }}'

      - name: 'Set up Cloud SDK'
        uses: 'google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2'

      - name: 'Run Samsung Real Device Tests'
        run: |
          gcloud firebase test android run \
            --type robo \
            --app app-debug.apk \
            --device model=a01,version=10,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=a34,version=13,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=s23,version=14,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --timeout 2m

operations.find_block:
- name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk
operations.replace_with:
- name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk

  test:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: .

      - id: 'auth'
        uses: 'google-github-actions/auth@v2'
        with:
          credentials_json: '${{ secrets.GCP_SA_KEY }}'

      - name: 'Set up Cloud SDK'
        uses: 'google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2'

      - name: 'Run Samsung Real Device Tests'
        run: |
          gcloud firebase test android run \
            --type robo \
            --app app-debug.apk \
            --device model=a01,version=10,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=a34,version=13,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --device model=s23,version=14,locale=en,orientation=portrait \
            --timeout 2m

ops.text: Fix ghost screen time by switching from UsageStats to UsageEvents

data.analysis:
**Error:** `ERROR: (gcloud.firebase.test.android.run) [artifact_drop/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk] not found or not accessible`

**File/Location:** Workflow YAML (in the `gcloud firebase test android run` step command).

**Summary:** The job failed because the specified path for the APK file does not exist in the workspace. While the `actions/download-artifact@v4` step successfully downloaded the `myandroid-apk` artifact to the `artifact_drop` directory, the subsequent `gcloud` command is looking for the APK at `artifact_drop/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`. 

**Probable Cause:** The file structure inside the downloaded artifact likely does not match the deep path provided in the `--app` argument. You should verify the contents of the `artifact_drop` folder (e.g., by running `ls -R artifact_drop` in the workflow) to confirm the exact location and filename of the `.apk` file.

ops.text: Complete rewrite of build.yml to fix malformed YAML causing GitHub API 404s

ops.content:
name: Build Android APK

on: 
  workflow_dispatch:
  repository_dispatch:
    types: [conduit_build_trigger]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Log Build Context
        if: github.event.client_payload
        run: echo "Build triggered for version ${{ github.event.client_payload.version }}"

      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle & Cache
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Run Lint Analysis
        run: ./gradlew lintDebug

      - name: Upload Lint Report
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: lint-report
          path: app/build/reports/lint-results-debug.html

      - name: Build APK
        run: ./gradlew assembleDebug

      # - name: Upload Test Report
      #   if: always() 
      #   uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      #   with:
      #     name: test-report
      #     path: app/build/reports/tests/testDebugUnitTest/

      - name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk

operations.content:
name: Build Android APK

on: 
  workflow_dispatch:
  repository_dispatch:
    types: [conduit_build_trigger]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Log Build Context
        if: github.event.client_payload
        run: echo "Build triggered for version ${{ github.event.client_payload.version }}"

      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle & Cache
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Run Lint Analysis
        run: ./gradlew lintDebug

      - name: Upload Lint Report
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: lint-report
          path: app/build/reports/lint-results-debug.html

      - name: Build APK
        run: ./gradlew assembleDebug

      # - name: Upload Test Report
      #   if: always() 
      #   uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      #   with:
      #     name: test-report
      #     path: app/build/reports/tests/testDebugUnitTest/

      - name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: myandroid-apk
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk
